headline: Molson Coors Beverage Company (TAP) Expects a Significant Dip in 2026 Profit
summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) is among the 12 Best Alcohol Stocks to Buy Right Now. On February 19, 2026, Reuters reported that Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) expects a significant dip in 2026 profit due to rising aluminum tariffs and decreased consumption among price-sensitive consumers. The brewer forecasts adjusted earnings per share to fall […]
